tagline: Craft Beer • Local Food • San Diego Vibes
description: Hidden Craft is a San Diego restaurant and craft beer bar featuring over 30 self-serve taps showcasing local breweries. They serve house-made food including tacos, bowls, and burgers designed to complement their rotating beer selections. The venue offers dine-in, takeout, catering, and private event hosting services.
location: Corner India and C Street, San Diego, CA
social_proof: Google reviews present with 5-star ratings. Praised for delicious food, clean atmosphere, pleasant service.
key_cta: Order Online / Book a Table / Book a Party
missing: Phone number not provided, email not listed, business hours not specified, complete menu not visible, pricing not shown
brand_vibe: Casual yet refined, vibrant San Diego craft culture, community-focused
pain_point: No phone number or direct contact information readily visible, forcing customers to use forms or social media for inquiries.
chat_persona: Knowledgeable and friendly neighborhood guide who shares passion for local craft beer and house-made food while helping customers reserve tables, order food, or plan events.
cta_angle: Book Your Private Event or Reserve a Table to Experience Hidden Craft
